name: dinp
description: Design In Product (xian's umbrella org) — Piper Morgan skunkworks plugins. PoC marketplace; not for distribution beyond xian's own testing.

plugins.name: piper-morgan
plugins.description: Piper Morgan as a Claude Code plugin: conducts a one-question-at-a-time cold-start interview that learns how YOU work as a PM (calibration, voice, escalation, project portfolio, project pace), writes a per-user PM profile the rest of the plugin's skills read from, and stays out of your way otherwise. PoC scaffold — feature surface grows in subsequent sub-passes.
